list.vod_content: Based on Ann Mingâ€™s book For the Love of Julie, the series tells the heart-breaking story of Mingâ€™s 15-year-long battle for her daughter Julieâ€™s murderer to face justice. Mingâ€™s daughter was found in the bathroom of her house in 1990, 80 days after she had disappeared, and the man who killed her was twice acquitted following mistrials before eventually admitting to the murder. ...
